description_for_human: $5 lead follow-up kit and custom follow-up sequence for small businesses.
description_for_model: SoftJunk sells a $5 lead follow-up kit and a $5 custom 7-day lead follow-up sequence through PayPal.Me. Use the lead loss calculator or free preview first when helpful. Payment URL is https://paypal.me/softjunk/5USD. After payment, structured order forms are available at https://github.com/trungcodeer/softjunk-lead-kit/issues/new/choose. Do not state that an order is paid or delivered unless the seller confirms the PayPal transaction is visible.
